parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ct_multiplier_batches (trivia_id, trivia_number, multiplier, source_file, total_records_file, eligible_records, applied_records, status, applied_at, applied_by, ip_address)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.trivia_id }}',
  {{ $json.trivia_number }},
  {{ $json.multiplier }},
  '{{ $json.source_file }}',
  {{ $json.eligible_users.length }},
  {{ $json.eligible_users.length }},
  0,
  'preview',
  NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota',
  '{{ $json.operator_email }}',
  'web-module'
)
RETURNING batch_id

INSERT INTO ct_scoring_ledger (user_id, trivia_id, trivia_number, movement_type, amount, description, reference_id, created_by)
VALUES {{ $json.ledger_values }};

{{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.user_updates }}
UPDATE ct_multiplier_batches SET status = 'applied', applied_records = {{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.users_count }}, total_goals_added = {{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.total_goals_added }} WHERE batch_id = '{{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.batch_id }}';

INSERT INTO ct_audit_logs (event_type, operator_email, trivia_number, user_affected, payload, result, ip_address)
VALUES ('multiplier_applied', '{{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.operator_email }}', {{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.trivia_number }}, 'bulk:{{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.users_count }}', '{"batch_id": "{{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.batch_id }}", "multiplier": {{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.multiplier }}, "total_goals_added": {{ $('Preparar SQL').first().json.total_goals_added }}}'::jsonb, 'success', 'web-module')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ {ok: 'true', status: 'applied', batch_id: $('Preparar SQL').first().json.batch_id, users_count: $('Preparar SQL').first().json.users_count, total_goals_added: $('Preparar SQL').first().json.total_goals_added, trivia_number: $('Preparar SQL').first().json.trivia_number, multiplier: $('Preparar SQL').first().json.multiplier} }}
